Name: get_department_manager
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."get_department_manager"($1) AS "_fn_get_department_manager" WHERE "_fn_get_department_manager"."department_id" = ANY($2::uuid[]) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."department_id" AS "department_id", "_root.base"."role" AS "role") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base"
